productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Pink Printed Dress
description: Style Note This pink and grey dress, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous dress. Style this with understated accessories and heeled shoes. Product Details Pink and grey printed sleeveless dress with a round, elasticated neckline, pleated from the neckline to the waist, a belt to accessorise with loops and a flared skirt Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
